ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company (e.g., ABCB) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission type (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Table name associated with the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the companies table */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading day */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the trading day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the trading day */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the stock_prices table */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "data" TEXT /* Actual data for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
